_meta.description: League champions by season — COMPLETE, all 17 seasons (2009-2025). Champions extracted from each legacy/gen_h2h_YYYY.py header comment, plus 2009 (STATUS.md), 2010 (scraped_2025_2010.md), 2025 (report). titlesByManager is derived from byYear and sums to 17.
_meta.seasonCount: 17 canonical seasons (2009-2025 inclusive). The '16 seasons' in the legacy docs/report was a stale undercount from when 2010 was missing. David won BOTH 2010 and 2020 — the report only knew 2020 (2010 was absent), which is why the report credited David with 1 title; his true total is 2. All other managers' title counts match the report.

byYear.note: gen_h2h_2011.py header. Team confirmed by Patrick (2026-07); team name corrected to Yahoo's 'Shawn Kemp's Kids' via lineup scrape.
gen_h2h_2012.py header (Final: duncan 156.61 vs Kyle 132.79). Team confirmed by Patrick (2026-07).
gen_h2h_2013.py header (Larson beats duncan 153.18-115.99). Manager displays as 'Robbie'; the 2013 team was literally named 'Larson'. Confirmed by Patrick (2026-07).
gen_h2h_2014.py header (Antony beats Raj 155.31-87.84). Team confirmed by Patrick (2026-07).
gen_h2h_2015.py header (PatrickF beats Daniel 88.05-74.24). Team confirmed via Hall of Team Names.
gen_h2h_2016.py header (Antony beats Kyle 140.54-89.51). Team confirmed by Patrick (2026-07).
gen_h2h_2017.py header (Kyle2 beats Raj 132.36-93.12). Kyle2 = Kyle P. Team confirmed via Hall of Team Names.
gen_h2h_2018.py header (RyanC beats Kyle2 157.43-93.61). Team confirmed via Hall of Team Names.
gen_h2h_2019.py header (duncan beats David 164.05-103.21). Team confirmed via Hall of Team Names.
gen_h2h_2020.py header (David beats Daniel 178.14-125.26). David's second title. Team confirmed via Hall of Team Names.
gen_h2h_2021.py header (Ryan beats Kyle 125.64-113.64). Ryan = Rudee. Team confirmed via Hall of Team Names.
gen_h2h_2022.py header (championship final Antony vs Kyle). Antony's return after 2019-2021 absence; his 4th title. Team confirmed by Patrick (2026-07).
